description: Distributed CRDT-plane anti-entropy replay. A binding's CrdtPlaneRuntime ingests each scenario's `ops` (each a state-based CrdtOp) and MUST converge to `expect.converged` regardless of delivery order, and re-ingesting an already-seen frame MUST apply 0 new ops (state-based CvRDT idempotence). This fixture models LWW cells where the plane WireStamp IS the register's decisive stamp: for a given node the winning state is the op with the greatest WireStamp under lexicographic (wall_time, logical, peer) order. Op-log dedup is keyed by (node, stamp).

scenarios.name: lww_last_writer_wins
scenarios.description: Highest WireStamp wins per node; peer id is the final tie-break (node/count exercises the (wall,logical) tie -> higher peer wins).

scenarios.name: idempotent_redelivery
scenarios.description: Re-ingesting the same frame applies 0 new ops and leaves the converged state unchanged.

scenarios.name: out_of_order_converges
scenarios.description: Delivering the same op set in reverse order converges to the identical winner.
